name: HappilyEverAfter Planner
tagline: Plan the day without losing the details.
shortDescription: A modern wedding planning app for organizing timelines, guests, budgets, vendors, and day-of tasks in one clear workspace.
description: HappilyEverAfter Planner helps couples manage the full wedding planning process with a calm, organized experience. Track key milestones, keep budgets visible, manage guests and RSVPs, capture vendor notes, and stay ready for the wedding weekend with checklists that keep everyone aligned.

screenshots.alt: HappilyEverAfter Planner guest list and RSVP tracking screen

features: Build a wedding timeline with milestone reminders from engagement to wedding weekend.
Track budget categories, deposits, and remaining balances in one shared view.
Manage guests, RSVPs, party assignments, and seating notes without spreadsheet sprawl.
Keep vendor details, contacts, contracts, and follow-up notes organized by category.
Use day-of checklists to coordinate final tasks, logistics, and ceremony timing.
Review planning progress in a clean mobile-first workspace built for quick updates.
minIOSVersion: See the App Store listing for current iPhone and iOS compatibility
